title: Payment and Risk Control Platform
summary: Backend-focused full-stack work on a multi-tenant payment and risk-control platform combining workflow orchestration with configurable limit management for secure transaction decisioning.
highlights: Designed and delivered core backend modules for payment service, admin service, and shared services in Java 17-25 with Spring Boot
Built tenant-level limit management with multi-dimensional rules, including amount thresholds, operating windows, and channel constraints
Implemented tenant-aware RBAC and data isolation across functional and data-level access boundaries
Developed event-driven flows with the Outbox pattern and Redis Streams to improve asynchronous reliability
Designed lease-based distributed scheduling to reduce duplicate workflow execution across nodes
Optimized MySQL and Redis interactions for higher stability under concurrent workloads
Maintained schema evolution, API documentation, and H2 integration tests to improve team onboarding speed
role: Java Engineer, ANP Technology Pty Ltd

title: Event-Driven Payment Platform
summary: An event-driven microservices platform for order and payment processing with consistency guarantees, resilient messaging, and secure API access.
highlights: Designed and implemented microservices for order and payment orchestration
Applied the Outbox pattern to ensure consistency between database transactions and event publishing
Built idempotent consumers to safely handle duplicate message delivery
Implemented retry strategy and dead letter queue handling for failure scenarios
Integrated OAuth2 for secure API access and service-to-service trust
Containerized services with Docker Compose for consistent local and deployment environments

title: Flash Sale System
summary: A high-concurrency transaction system built to absorb traffic spikes, protect inventory consistency, and sustain throughput under extreme load.
highlights: Designed high-concurrency request flow for peak-time flash sale traffic
Prevented overselling through Redis plus Lua atomic inventory deduction
Decoupled ingress traffic from order processing through Kafka buffering
Implemented token-bucket rate limiting for abusive traffic control
Improved throughput and resilience under load tests and burst scenarios

title: Workflow Engine Platform
summary: A BPMN-driven workflow platform supporting multi-step approval processes, asynchronous jobs, and timer-based orchestration for business operations.
highlights: Developed BPMN-based workflow execution for business process orchestration
Designed multi-step approval flows such as expense approval systems
Built RESTful APIs for process definition, task handling, and workflow operations
Implemented asynchronous jobs and timer events for delayed or scheduled actions

title: Integrated Supplier Platform for Online Gaming
summary: Full-stack contributions to a high-traffic supplier aggregation platform that exposed unified APIs, supported multi-account operations, and improved platform observability.
highlights: Implemented scalable backend services and frontend interfaces for supplier integration workflows
Built a dynamic log and alert system to aggregate supplier requests and proactively notify downstream clients on failures
Participated in CI/CD, server deployment, and metrics monitoring to improve reliability
Collaborated in design reviews and cross-team delivery to optimize feature quality and incident resolution

title: Job Mail Scan and Application Tracker
summary: A Spring Boot backend that converts Gmail inbox activity into an automatic job application tracker, with status classification, thread-level deduplication, and searchable APIs.
highlights: Integrated OAuth2 and Gmail API to fetch paginated messages and parse MIME content
Implemented a rule-based classification engine mapping emails to application status with prioritized keyword matching
Built thread-based deduplication and priority status merge logic to avoid regression updates
Designed REST APIs for CRUD and multi-field filtering using JPA Specifications
Added production-grade secret loading via GCP Secret Manager with environment fallback
Delivered 700+ lines of tests across classifier, parser, and controller layers
Containerized with multi-stage Docker builds and Docker Compose
